---
title: "Eleanor Victoria Parsons"
---

## Eleanor Victoria Parsons

**Dates:** (1855-1936)

**Maiden name:** (Mackarness)

### Description

cousin of CMY, daughter of Alethea (Coleridge) Mackarness

### Biography

She married (1876) the Hon. and Rev. Randal Parsons.

### Letters

- Letter from July 3d [1876]
- Letter from June 1st 1876

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
